---
title: "Tx_Normalization"
author: "Dipankor Dhrubo"
date: "2025-12-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(umap)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(factoextra)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)
library(forcats)
```



```{r}

NSCLC_metadata <- read_rds("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/NSCLC_metadata.rds") %>% select(-Race)

Modified_medication <- read_rds("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Medication_NSCLCORIEN.rds")


### Function that normalize the timeline so that everything starts from 0.

tx_normalize <- function(
  Modified_medication,
  NSCLC_metadata = NULL
){
  suppressPackageStartupMessages({
    library(dplyr); library(tidyr)
  })

  # Add age_at_death_progression like your old code
  Modified_medication <- Modified_medication %>%
    mutate(age_at_death_progression = AgeAtDiagnosis + diagsurvtime)

  # Clean and define mod start
  df_clean <- Modified_medication %>%
    filter(!is.na(AgeAtMedStart), !is.na(AgeAtMedStop)) %>%
    mutate(AgeAtTreatmentStart.mod = if_else(
      AgeAtDiagnosis > AgeAtMedStart, AgeAtDiagnosis, AgeAtMedStart
    )) %>%
    filter(AgeAtMedStop > AgeAtTreatmentStart.mod)

  # Expand to monthly grid (faithful)
  expanded_timeline <- df_clean %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(month_seq = list(seq(AgeAtTreatmentStart.mod, AgeAtMedStop, by = 1/12))) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    unnest(month_seq) %>%
    mutate(month_seq = round(month_seq, 3)) %>%
    distinct(sample, treatment_group, month_seq)

  timeline_long_monthly <- expanded_timeline %>%
    rename(AgeMonth = month_seq) %>%
    select(sample, AgeMonth, treatment_group)

  # Normalize so first treatment month = 0
  start_age_per_patient <- timeline_long_monthly %>%
    group_by(sample) %>%
    summarise(start_age = min(AgeMonth, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

  timeline_long_norm <- timeline_long_monthly %>%
    left_join(start_age_per_patient, by = "sample") %>%
    mutate(TimeSinceTreatmentStart = AgeMonth - start_age) %>%
    mutate(TimeSinceTreatmentStart = round(TimeSinceTreatmentStart * 12) / 12)

  # Join metadata (Stage/status)
  if (!is.null(NSCLC_metadata)) {
    timeline_long_norm <- timeline_long_norm %>%
      left_join(NSCLC_metadata %>% select(sample, Stage, status), by = "sample")
  }

  # Join age_at_death_progression (faithful)
  timeline_long_norm <- timeline_long_norm %>%
    left_join(Modified_medication %>% select(sample, age_at_death_progression), by = "sample") %>%
    distinct()

  timeline_long_norm
}



Normalized_timeline <- tx_normalize(
  Modified_medication,
  NSCLC_metadata = NSCLC_metadata
)

write_csv(Normalized_timeline,"/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Function_files/Normalized_timeline.csv")


##### Function that provide a time interval for each medication per patients

tx_intervals <- function(
  df,
  id_col   = "sample",
  time_col = "TimeSinceTreatmentStart",
  type_col = "treatment_group",
  drop_types = c("None", NA),
  horizon_years = 5
){
  suppressPackageStartupMessages({
    library(dplyr)
    library(stringr)
    library(tidyr)
  })

  canon <- function(x){
    x <- as.character(x)
    case_when(
      str_detect(x, regex("radiation|\\brt\\b|xrt|imrt|sbrt", TRUE)) ~ "Radiation",
      str_detect(x, regex("\\bio\\b|immuno|pembro|nivol|atezo|ipi|pd", TRUE)) ~ "IO",
      str_detect(x, regex("chemo|chemotherapy|platin|taxel|5fu|gem", TRUE)) ~ "Chemo",
      str_detect(x, regex("target|tki|egfr|alk|braf|mek|parp", TRUE)) ~ "Targeted",
      str_detect(x, regex("hormone|endocrine|tamox|abiraterone", TRUE)) ~ "Hormone",
      str_detect(x, regex("small[ _-]?molecule|oncodrug", TRUE)) ~ "Small_Molecule",
      str_detect(x, regex("ancillary|support|palliat", TRUE)) ~ "Ancillary",
      TRUE ~ "Others"
    )
  }

  # ---- 1) Clean + SNAP to month grid like your old pipeline ----
  dat <- df %>%
    transmute(
      sample = .data[[id_col]],
      t_year_raw = as.numeric(.data[[time_col]]),
      type = canon(.data[[type_col]])
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(sample), !is.na(t_year_raw)) %>%
    filter(!(type %in% drop_types)) %>%
    mutate(
      # snap to nearest month
      t_year = round(t_year_raw * 12) / 12,
      # month index (integer), consistent with snapped t_year
      m = as.integer(round(t_year * 12)),
      # clamp to horizon months
      m = pmax(0L, pmin(m, as.integer(horizon_years * 12)))
    )

  if (!nrow(dat)) {
    return(tibble::tibble(sample=character(), type=character(),
                          block=integer(), start_year=double(), end_year=double()))
  }

  # ---- 2) Block defined ONLY by month continuity ----
  month_blocks <- dat %>%
    distinct(sample, m) %>%
    arrange(sample, m) %>%
    group_by(sample) %>%
    mutate(
      new_block = m != lag(m, default = first(m)) + 1L,
      block = cumsum(replace_na(new_block, TRUE))
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  dat2 <- dat %>%
    distinct(sample, m, type) %>%
    left_join(month_blocks, by = c("sample","m")) %>%
    arrange(sample, block, type, m)

  # ---- 3) Merge consecutive months per type ----
  segs <- dat2 %>%
    group_by(sample, block, type) %>%
    mutate(
      new_run = m != lag(m, default = first(m)) + 1L,
      run = cumsum(replace_na(new_run, TRUE))
    ) %>%
    group_by(sample, block, type, run) %>%
    summarise(
      start_year = min(m) / 12,
      end_year   = (max(m) + 1L) / 12,  # end exclusive
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(sample, block, start_year, type)

  segs
}



Refined_timeline <- tx_intervals(Normalized_timeline,
                                    id_col   = "sample",
                                    time_col = "TimeSinceTreatmentStart",
                                    type_col = "treatment_group")


write_csv(Refined_timeline,"/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Function_files/Refined_intervals.csv")

```
